chunks.text: One afternoon, I suddenly felt, “ Time is really something strange.
When I looked at the clock, it was just past noon.
Only one minute ago, I was cleaning up after lunch.
Yet already, I was thinking about the hours until dinner.
“ In half an hour, my favorite anime will start,” my sister said
My father pointed at an old photograph.
“ A century ago, people did not have such accurate clocks.
” When I think about the time of the past, I feel a little strange.
There are still many hours until midnight.
But second by second, the time moves forward into the future.
A quarter of the day is morning, another quarter is before noon, another is afternoon
and the last quarter is night.
When I think of it that way, the flow of a day feels well balanced.
